infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow TuranEliteLimo to use your location to show your pickup point and track your chauffeur during a ride.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Drivers need background location so passengers can see live ETA updates throughout the trip.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Drivers can upload a profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Drivers can choose a profile photo from their library.
